title: coussarea leptophragma
intro: Coussarea leptophragma is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coussarea plant or the yellow root. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Coussarea leptophragma include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or powder for its medicinal properties.
